resultList.dtldesc: Are you looking for a permanent residence in Chennai Then, come and have a look at this 2 BHK Flat available for sale in Lic Nagar Alaiamman Nagar, Chennai. With thoughtful design and premium amenities, this property is ready to welcome you into a life of comfort and ease.Embrace the charm and elegance of this exquisite residence and make it your new home, where every moment spent with your loved ones is cherished.Property Specifications This charming east-facing flat spans a carpet area of 886 sq ft and offers you a 100 Vastu-compliant floor plan where you can experience peace of mind, joy, and prosperity. Being located on the ground floor of a two-story building, every room of this flat is filled with ample sunlight and fresh air. Showcasing elegant interiors and vitrified tiles for the flooring, this flat. This semi-furnished flat comes with 2 bedrooms with fancy wardrobes in each bedroom, providing ample storage space for your belongings. There are also two western bathrooms, one of which is attached to the bedroom and the other is available for common use. Along with a spacious living cum dining area, perfect for family gatherings and entertaining guests, there is also a kitchen equipped with covered cabinets, a granite platform, a stainless steel sink and a utility area, ensuring efficient space management.Facilities This property offers a range of facilities designed such as sufficient covered parking space for your vehicles, an unrestricted water supply, a vigilant security guard and a maid to ensure a safe and well-maintained environment.Locality This property is situated in the sought-after area of LIC Nagar from where the railway station is within 4km, and the metro station is just 3 km away, offering excellent connectivity to other parts of the city. The major means of roadways such as buses, cabs, taxis, and autos make commuting to and fro easy.Some of the prominent schools are within 500 meters, ensuring easy access to quality education. Nearby hospitals and healthcare facilities provide peace of mind in case of medical emergencies. Malls and supermarkets are in close proximity, catering to your shopping and daily needs. Banks and ATMs are also conveniently located nearby, making financial transactions easy and accessible.

resultList.dtldesc: Well-Maintained 2 BHK Apartment in Porur, ChennaiPresenting a ready-to-move 2 BHK apartment in the well-connected neighbourhood of Porur, Chennai. Situated near Porur Toll Gate and within close proximity to essential urban conveniences, this semi-furnished residence offers comfort, accessibility, and practical design. Located in the established residential community of Lotus Appartements, the property is ideal for families and working professionals seeking a balanced lifestyle in West Chennai.Property SpecificationsThis apartment features a super built-up area of 1042 sq. ft with an approximate carpet area of 998 sq. ft, ensuring efficient use of space. Positioned on the 1st floor of an 8-storey building comprising only 8 flats, the home offers privacy within a low-density residential setting.The layout includes two bedrooms and two bathrooms, designed to provide functional living for a small or mid-sized family. Two balconies enhance natural ventilation and daylight while offering pleasant outdoor extensions to the living space. The living and dining areas are combined, creating an open and welcoming atmosphere suitable for everyday living and entertaining.The kitchen is of standard configuration without a chimney, allowing flexibility for custom upgrades. Vitrified tile flooring runs throughout the apartment, providing durability and ease of maintenance. The property is east facing and Vastu compliant, ensuring favourable natural light and airflow. Being semi-furnished, it includes essential fittings while leaving scope for personal interior enhancements.FacilitiesResidents benefit from one covered parking space and 24-hour water supply, ensuring daily convenience. The building is equipped with CCTV surveillance and security arrangements, enhancing safety. A lift services the structure, supporting comfortable access to all floors. The apartment overlooks the main road, contributing to accessibility while maintaining residential comfort.LocalityPorur is a rapidly developing residential and commercial hub in Chennai with strong road and metro connectivity. Schools are located within approximately 100 metres, hospitals within 500 metres, and a metro station is also around 500 metres away. Markets and shopping facilities are accessible within about 5 km, ensuring ease of everyday living.This 2 BHK apartment in Porur presents a practical opportunity to own a well-located, ready-to-move home in a growing and infrastructure-rich part of Chennai.
